Chameleon

One player gets the Chameleon card. Everyone else sees the secret category. The Chameleon must bluff their way through.

Ready to deal

Each player looks at their card privately

Discussion Phase
Each player gives ONE word related to the category.
The Chameleon doesn't know the category — they must bluff!
🗳 Who is the Chameleon?
Vote by tapping a name. Majority rules.
🎯 Last Chance!
The Chameleon was caught. Guess the secret category to steal the win!

Cursed Dungeon
TOME
🏚️
The Cursed Dungeon
7 cards are revealed. Turn them face-down on the table, then take turns flipping pairs. Find all 3 relics to escape. Flip the Curse and the dungeon seals forever.

Decks

Library of card sets and games

Each deck is a set of card images that lives at specific slot numbers on your physical cards. Install once — the cards remember the images.

← Decks
5-Card Poker
TOME
Hand
Tap "Deal" to start

A random 5-card hand from a fresh shuffled deck. Cards Pr1–Pr5 display the dealt cards. Pr6–Pr7 are unused.

← Decks
Castle Quest
TOME
🏰
Castle Quest

Race across seven lands to confront the Hollow Lord. Stop along the way to train your power — but go too slow and another player will reach the throne first.

How it works
On your turn, pick ONE action, then pass the turn:
Move — advance 1 or 2 waystones along the path.
Train — gain 1–4 power (XP).
Treasure Hunt — 75% chance to find a random item.

Use Item is a free action — play anything from your bag any time.

Reach the gold castle waystone and fight the Hollow Lord. Roll a die plus your power; if you beat 20, you win. Lose and the boss strikes back — first player to land the killing blow takes the throne.
Physical Board
Install the 8 terrain images to your TOME cards, then push them to the displays.
